items.title: Home Discovery Platform: operating discovery
items.name: Home Discovery Platform: operating discovery
items.summary: Discovery work is testing whether home discovery platform can move the linked customer and business KPIs while addressing lead quality and response speed while affordability pressure constrains supply and conversion.
items.opportunity: Clarify whether this bet is strong enough to scale in the next planning cycle, or whether the organization should narrow scope and protect focus.

linkedInitiatives.description: Home Discovery Platform Initiative is the quarter's focused investment to move Successful housing decision rate and Qualified demand GMV influence, anchored in lead quality and response speed while affordability pressure constrains supply and conversion and led through Homepage. The quarter concentrates on affordability pressure, lead quality, and faster response loops for supply-constrained markets so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

assignments.teamName: Home Discovery Growth - B2C Web Shell
assignments.how: Leads the discovery framing, evidence synthesis, and recommendation on how far this initiative should scale.
Adds workflow, commercial, and implementation evidence needed to close the main delivery risks.

assignments.teamName: Home Discovery Growth - Saved Search Alerts
assignments.how: Adds workflow, commercial, and implementation evidence needed to close the main delivery risks.

assignments.teamName: Market Intelligence & Pricing - Property Valuation Tool
assignments.how: Adds workflow, commercial, and implementation evidence needed to close the main delivery risks.
Adds workflow, commercial, and implementation evidence needed to close the main delivery risks.

riskFocus.question: Will customers buy the product and/or choose to use it?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Customers will engage more consistently if home discovery platform measurably improves successful housing decision rate.
evidenceToCollect: Whether target users describe successful housing decision rate as a top-priority pain point.
Whether the proposed workflow changes are strong enough to change behavior, not just preference.

riskFocus.question: Will the solution meet the needs of the business?
riskFocus.hypothesis: The investment is worth scaling when it improves qualified demand gmv influence without creating disproportionate operating cost or support load.
evidenceToCollect: Which economic or operating constraints cap the upside.
What minimum KPI movement would justify continued investment.

riskFocus.question: Can customers figure out how to use it?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Users can complete the redesigned workflow with less guidance and less back-and-forth than the current path.
evidenceToCollect: Where users hesitate in the new flow.
Which messages, states, or transitions remain unclear.

riskFocus.question: Can we build it within given resources and constraints?
riskFocus.hypothesis: The teams can deliver the smallest useful slice inside current architecture and staffing constraints without creating a long tail of one-off work.
evidenceToCollect: What can be standardized versus localized or custom.

plannedActivities: Replay valuation, listing, and lead-routing journeys for supply-constrained segments.
Compare owner and agency workflows to identify where lead quality degrades before first contact.
Test whether stronger guidance and ranking signals improve response quality without hurting supply creation.
items.decisionToMake: Decide whether the next wave should prioritize supply acquisition quality or speed-to-contact improvements on existing inventory first.

outcome.summary: Discovery closed enough uncertainty to make a concrete sequencing and investment decision for the following quarter.
